notes: Agent/control host: kept for agent use, NOT a bench target. Placement law run-on-bench-nodes-by-default — bench_node.sh refuses a node flagged agent_host and the driver's own self-IP, so hardware benchmark runs are dispatched to the dedicated bench nodes (node-macos-a, workstation-a, gcp-g2-l4, a100) over Tailscale. This box can download model artifacts locally. The RX 7600 is the AMD Vulkan-lane GPU; all specs here are measured on this machine.
